synopsis: Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns is an expansion pack to the Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds video game that was released shortly after the theatrical release of Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones. It introduced two more playable civilizations and two more campaigns: that of the Confederacy of Independent Systems and the Galactic Republic.
title: Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns
